_llm_comment: If running inside Claude Code: set llm_provider to 'claude-cli' and omit llm_api_key entirely. Claude Code will call itself — no separate API key needed.
_llm_other_providers: Alternatives: 'anthropic' (sk-ant-...), 'openai' (sk-...), 'gemini' (AIza...), 'groq' (gsk_...), 'openrouter' (sk-or-...), 'mistral'. Add llm_api_key when using these.
